blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by test-environment issue: ConflictingBeanDefinitionException on duplicate bean name `inventoryValuationService` during integration context bootstrap.
Blocked by test-environment issue: ConflictingBeanDefinitionException on duplicate bean name `inventoryValuationService` during integration context bootstrap.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded systemic blocker that inventory integration tests requiring full Spring context fail due duplicate `inventoryValuationService` bean naming conflict, with guidance to use runtime/controller/domain evidence and report blocker explicitly until resolved.
Reinforced fallback guidance for this environment where `user-testing-flow-validator` Task spawning may fail with invalid model alias, requiring in-session grouped flow execution.

systemicBlockers.description: `ConflictingBeanDefinitionException`: bean name `inventoryValuationService` conflicts between `com.bigbrightpaints.erp.modules.reports.service.InventoryValuationService` and `com.bigbrightpaints.erp.modules.inventory.service.InventoryValuationService`, preventing Spring context startup for integration classes (`InventoryAdjustmentCostingMethodTest`, `RawMaterialAdjustmentServiceTest`, `InventoryBatchQueryServiceTest`).
systemicBlockers.impact: Blocks re-execution of inventory integration classes in this run; does not affect already-passing unit/runtime/contract subset used for validation evidence.
